title: The Resolution
story_beat: Pink Bear and her friends joyfully rebuild their Easter celebration, finding a new, even better way to share the day.

techniques.name: sensory_detail
techniques.reason: To make the final, resolved scenes incredibly vivid and memorable for young readers, emphasizing the joy and newness of the rebuilt Easter.

techniques.name: character_voice
techniques.reason: To ensure Pink Bear's optimistic and problem-solving personality shines through in her words and actions as she helps create the new Easter celebration.

techniques.name: story_structure
techniques.reason: To guide Chris in crafting a satisfying and clear resolution where Pink Bear's journey comes to a joyful close, leaving readers with a sense of completion.

wonder_prompt: Think about your favorite stories. What's the last thing you remember? What feeling does that final scene leave you with, and why does it stick in your mind long after you close the book?
wonder_example: The Gruffalo said that no gruffalo should Ever set foot in the deep dark wood. And he walked through the wood till all was quiet and still. And the mouse found a nut and the nut was good. (Julia Donaldson, The Gruffalo)
build_instructions: This session, focus on guiding Pink Bear and her friends to a joyful resolution, showing how they rebuild their Easter plans together and create a new, memorable celebration.
page_prompts: Pink Bear and her friends have decided to make new Easter plans indoors. Write the moment Pink Bear, with her optimistic spirit, suggests the very first thing they can do to start their new celebration.

As they work together, Pink Bear notices everyone contributing in their own special way. Write a scene where Pink Bear helps a friend with a tricky part of their indoor Easter creation, highlighting their teamwork.
The new indoor Easter celebration is complete! Write the final, joyful scene where Pink Bear looks around at what they've created together, feeling the warmth and happiness of their rebuilt plans.
reflect_preview: Pink Bear's story is now complete! You've guided her through challenges to a joyful, rebuilt Easter. How do you feel about the beautiful, warm ending you crafted for Pink Bear and her friends?
